name: Nordic Group Limited
summary: Nordic Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides solutions in the areas of system integration; maintenance, repair, overhaul, and trading; precision engineering; scaffolding; insulation; petrochemical and environmental engineering; and cleanroom, air, and water engineering. The company turns systems into solutions by providing flow, automation, and navigation solutions that include valve remote control and tank gauging systems. It also offers services, such as engineering, procurement, installation, and commissioning for conversion, upgrading, and factory and infrastructure automation, as well as after-sales support services. In addition, the company designs and builds tooling systems; and offers production solutions for marine, oil and gas, aerospace, medical, and electronic manufacturing service industries. Further, it provides metal scaffold services includes design, erection, modification, and dismantling, as well as sells and rents tubular frames and aluminum scaffolds. Additionally, the company offers thermal and cryogenic insulation, thermal spray aluminum, and passive fireproofing services. It offers engineering repair, maintenance, and plant turnaround, as well as decontamination, process plant recovery, pre and post commissioning cleaning, heat exchanger and tank cleaning, intervention activities, equipment support, product filtering, and support in operation of utility plants services. The company also provides tools hook up services, air pollution control scrubbers, and water treatment plants. In addition, it manufactures aircraft components and hydraulic actuators; provides construction and painting services; and integrates, assembles, trades in, imports, and exports hydraulic systems and marine components. The company serves marine, oil and gas, infrastructure, construction, semiconductor, power plant and municipality, petrochemical, manufacturing, and pharmaceutical industries in Singapore and China. Nordic Group Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Singapore.
